
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Banana Bread with Coconut Oil.
    Summary: Nathan,

So I wanted banana bread that didn’t get hard when reheated because of the butter so I just tried it with coconut oil. It worked!!  I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 2 cups flour, 1 ½ teaspoon baking powder, ½ teaspoon baking soda, ¼ teaspoon cinnamon, ⅛ teaspoon nutmeg, 2  eggs, 1 ½ cups mashed banana, 1 cup sugar, ½ cup coconut oil (melted), ¼ cup walnuts
    Tags: bread, sweet, banana, breakfast

    Do not include any letters or text in the image.
    Make sure the picture includes a garden gnome in it.
